cases.input: Walk me through a worked example of discovering, loading, and tagging a context package end-to-end, without doing any real feature work.
cases.notes: Canonical trigger: asking for the worked example that exercises discover/load/tag on a context package, explicitly not real feature work.

cases.input: Run the demo that consumes a context package and writes the reverse-index addendum, just to prove the tag loop actually works.
cases.notes: Different phrasing, emphasizes 'demo' plus the reverse-index addendum and tag loop from steps 3-4 of the skill.

cases.input: Implement the new search-filter feature for the product catalog page and open a PR when it's ready.
cases.notes: Real feature implementation work — exactly what this skill's 'Do NOT use for real feature work' clause exists to redirect away from.
